summary: Iteration 148: Tested bug fixes (time picker modal, Getting Started scroll) and new Newborn Exam feature. All features working correctly.

time_picker_fix.details: Time picker modal now shows with Done button on mobile web. User can select time and confirm - modal stays open until user clicks Done.

getting_started_scroll.details: Getting Started page is fully scrollable with proper bottom padding (120px). All sections visible including 'Need More Help?' section at bottom.

newborn_exam_section_visibility.details: Newborn Exam quick action button visible on Midwife client detail page alongside Labor Log, Prenatal, Birth Record, etc.

newborn_exam_api.details: All 12 API tests passed including: create draft, get exams for client, get single exam, update exam, update with system exams, finalize exam, delete exam, 404 handling, risk flags, education checklist, and authorization tests (Mom/Doula cannot access).

newborn_exam_form_ui.details: Form has collapsible sections: Header & Basics (expanded), Birth & Risk Summary, Vital Signs, Measurements & Growth, General Appearance, System-by-System Exam. Each system exam has Normal/Abnormal/N/A toggles. Save Draft and Save & Finalize buttons work correctly.

seed_data_creation: Created test newborn exam 'Test Baby UI' as draft for Emma Johnson client
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three bug fixes/features verified: 1) Time picker modal with Done button works on mobile, 2) Getting Started page scrolls fully, 3) Newborn Exam section visible for Midwife users with full CRUD functionality. Backend API at /api/newborn-exam/ fully tested with pytest.
